chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Hajj of the Male and Female Slave

text: 2886 - رَوَى حَرِيزٌ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «كُلَّمَا أَصَابَ اَلْعَبْدُ اَلْمُحْرِمُ فِي إِحْرَامِهِ فَهُوَ عَلَى اَلسَّيِّدِ إِذَا أَذِنَ لَهُ فِي اَلْإِحْرَامِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2886 - Hariz narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"Whatever a servant in the state of Ihram incurs during their Ihram is the responsibility of the master if the master gave permission for the Ihram."
